title: Arkanian Microtechnologies

'''Arkanian Microtechnologies''', also known as '''Arkanian Micro''' for short, was a powerful manufacturing corporation known for its role in the development of medical supplies and technology. Headquartered on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vohai]], the company also had a branch near [[Novania]], a [[City/Legends|city]] located on [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]. In public, it was a major supplier of health products and technological equipment in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. However, the firm primarily specialized in the research and development of [[Bioengineering/Legends|genetic engineering]] techniques, ranging from direct manipulation of [[DNA/Legends|genomes]] to mutation via overexposure to massive amounts of [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]].

==History==
===Another clone army===
{{Quote|You worry too much, Clonemaster. I only require your clones to be fit for purpose, and that means they have no need to meet the exacting standards as the army bred on Kamino. The Grand Army has to be the very best in the galaxy for one single special operation ahead of them. This is the culmination of my strategy—two armies with two quite separate tasks.|Palpatine, to a Clone Master|<ref name="Order66" />}}
[[File:CloneTrooperPhase2Armor-RotSVD.png|thumb|right|200px|Arkanian Microtechnologies created an army of Spaarti-grown clone troopers to reinforce the clones from Kamino.]]
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] Microtechnologies was hired by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to create a cheaper second [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Army/Legends|army]] for the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The project was confidential, and thus billions of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] were discreetly siphoned from various [[Bank/Legends|bank]] accounts in order to fund the construction of cloning centers on [[Centax-2/Legends|Centax-2]], one of the [[Moon/Legends|moons]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. The new facilities were equipped with [[Spaarti cloning cylinder]]s, which Arkanian Micro's [[Scientist/Legends|scientists]] utilized to engineer full-grown clone [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] in one standard year, as opposed to the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoan]] method's ten-year waiting period. While the Spaarti method enabled the company to generate clones at a considerably faster rate than the Kaminoan-developed series of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], a one year growth period prevented Arkanian Micro's clone [[unit]]s from receiving the same training as their [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]-bred counterparts. The company used [[flash pumping]] computers to download the basics of being a soldier into the subjects, but even the company admitted that the combat effectiveness of Spaarti clones was significantly lower than the [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] from Kamino. Such drawbacks concerned one of the scientists who monitored their development, but the Chancellor assured the [[Clone Master/Legends|Clone Master]] that the new clone troopers did not have to be as effective as their precursors.<ref name="Order66" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the final year of the Clone Wars, the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] was a spent force. A third of the original clone troopers were [[Death/Legends|dead]] while others were too injured to fight; what remained of the army was stretched thin across the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] where the clones and their [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi officers]] fought the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|droid forces]] in a [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|series of grueling campaigns]]. By that time, Arkanian Microtechnologies deployed a vanguard of Spaarti clone troopers, officially commissioned as the [[14th Infantry Brigade]], into the war zone in order to test the effectiveness of their creations. Other clones from Centax-2 were integrated into existing military units such as the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] and [[Coruscant Guard/Legends|Coruscant Guard]]. Chancellor Palpatine publicly revealed the existence of the new clone army during the [[Battle of Coruscant/Legends|Battle of Coruscant]] when the Separatists launched a surprise attack on the galactic [[Capital/Legends|capital]]. In the aftermath of the Republic's victory at Coruscant, Arkanian Micro's clone troopers were assimilated into the Grand Army, thus replenishing its depleted ranks.<ref name="Order66" />

===Force-sensitive clones===
{{Quote|His clones won't have his memories, but I'm confident they'll have the same courage and loyalty, and their ideals will simply be the ones I provide for them. Loyalty to the Emperor. And his Force powers will be exceptionally valuable in the field.|Darth Vader|<ref name="Image" />}}
[[File:Stormtrooper_Saber_art.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Darth Vader commissioned the creation of Force-sensitive clone prototypes by Arkanian Microtechnologies.]]
After the Clone Wars, Arkanian Microtechnologies' services were retained by the Republic's successor state, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="Image" /> Under the reign of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] Palpatine, the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]] vastly augmented its [[Imperial Military/Legends|military forces]] with more [[Clone stormtrooper|clone soldiers]],<ref name="BattlefrontII">''[[Star Wars: Battlefront II]]''</ref> all of whom were generated by Imperial-controlled Kaminoan<ref name="TFUII">''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II]]''</ref> and Arkanian Micro facilities.<ref name="Image" /> Shortly after Palpatine's [[Declaration of a New Order|rise to power was completed]],<ref name="BattlefrontII" /> the Emperor and his [[Sith apprentice/Legends|Sith apprentice]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], tasked Arkanian Microtechnologies with a commission to enginneer [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] clones, a task that had long since been dismissed as impossible.<ref name="TFUII" /> Using the genetic material of the [[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hand]] [[Sa Cuis]], Arkanian Micro scientists developed the [[Cuis clone|Force-sensitive stormtroopers]]. Both Palpatine and Vader were impressed by them, and though they originally petitioned the company for more [[The Force/Legends|Force-wielding]] clones, the project was ultimately dismantled after the experimental [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] [[Skirmish aboard ST 321|rebelled]] against their creators due to the machinations of their [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] trainer, [[Sheyvan]].<ref name="2EdgedSword">{{InsiderCite|85|A Two-Edged Sword}}</ref>

===Post-Imperial era===
Arkanian Microtechnologies was still operational by [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], years after the Empire's [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|defeat]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Taun We/Legends|Taun We]] a female Kaminoan who served as [[Project Coordinator]] of the Republic clone army, joined the company as an employee and was stationed at its [[Vohai]] headquarters where she continued her research into cloning.<ref name="Bloodlines">''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]''</ref>
